source_note: EDHREC Average Deck pages fetched once at low volume for offline Commander Reference corpus analysis. The local card DB on 2026-05-13 does not resolve several new Secrets of Strixhaven support cards, so this artifact is an EDHREC-derived local-resolvable projection: unresolved support slots were replaced with on-theme Simic X-spell, +1/+1 counter, ramp, draw, and interaction cards already proven resolvable locally. Runtime generation consumes aggregate role/card signals only, not copied decklists, and does not depend on EDHREC or any unofficial API at runtime.
